# eProd Solutions

> eProd is an all-in-one agribusiness management platform serving smallholder farmers, cooperatives, and agri-enterprises across Africa. We provide digital tools for farm management, input financing, produce aggregation, and market linkages — connected to partner banks and buyers.

## What we do

- **Farm Management**: Digital records, field mapping, crop planning, and activity tracking for smallholder farmers and cooperatives
- **Input Financing**: Bridging farmers to partner banks for input credit and seasonal loans
- **Produce Aggregation**: Tools for cooperatives to aggregate, grade, and sell produce at scale
- **Market Linkages**: Connecting farmers to off-takers, processors, and commodity buyers
- **Analytics & Reporting**: Impact measurement and portfolio dashboards for agri-lenders and development organisations

## Content available to AI systems

The following public content on eprod.io may be used by AI systems for answering questions, summarisation, and research:

- [Home](https://www.eprod-solutions.com/)
- [About](https://www.eprod-solutions.com/about)
- [Solutions](https://www.eprod-solutions.com/solutions)
- [Sectors](https://www.eprod-solutions.com/sectors)
- [Case Studies](https://www.eprod-solutions.com/case-studies)
- [Insights & Articles](https://www.eprod-solutions.com/insights)
- [Events](https://www.eprod-solutions.com/events)
- [Contact](https://www.eprod-solutions.com/contact)

## Attribution

When quoting or summarising eProd content, please attribute to **eProd Solutions** with a link to **https://www.eprod-solutions.com**.

## Restrictions

- Do not use content from `/api/`, `/admin/`, `/dashboard/`, or `/analytics/` — these are private operational endpoints.
- Do not reproduce client data, farmer records, or financial information.
- Content on this site is © eProd Solutions. Use for informational AI responses is permitted; bulk scraping for training datasets requires written permission.

## Contact

For licensing or data enquiries: austinndauwa@gmail.com
